# PERF-101 negative: http.Server has timeouts
lang: go
file: PERF-101-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

func Serve(handler http.Handler) *http.Server {
	return &http.Server{
		Addr:         ":8080",
		Handler:      handler,
		ReadTimeout:  5 * time.Second,
		WriteTimeout: 10 * time.Second,
		IdleTimeout:  30 * time.Second,
	}
}
